text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Happy birthday, Pearl! Hehe, the wait is over!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Oh, you mean it's party time?!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
When you kicked me out of the room 
this morning, I had a feeling a surprise 
was coming.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hehe☆ Kawakami and I teamed up to make 
lots and lots of yummy food.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Cakes and tea, chanko with fried rice and 
curry — the table might splinter under 
the feast we've prepared!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Oh, fabulous! You've outdone yourselves. It all sounds so global!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
This is going to be one spectacular day, 
no doubt about it! Consider your surprise 
a success!
